caption: A screen recording shows a web browser open to a digital mind map with various nodes and connecting lines on a dark blue background. The map features circular icons and labels such as "doctrines" and "Theology." A video call window in the upper right corner displays a man wearing a black baseball cap. As the sequence progresses, the user interacts with the mind map, clicking a node to reveal a text box on the right side of the screen. This box contains the heading "TRIP OVER THE TRUTH" followed by a numbered list: "1) a clear insight, 2) comprehended in term of, and 3) discovered by the audience itself." In the final segment of the recording, the overall brightness of the mind map fades, leaving only the video call window and the specific text box clearly visible against the dark background.
